zh.lifeSummary: 當Sigrid Esbjörnsdotter於1475年出生在瑞典維亞斯特爾諾藍德斯卡爾姆瑟越時，她的父親Esbjörn Öndesson15歲，母親Elna Elin Persdotter13歲。她和Olof Eriksson至少有4個兒子。她去世於1550年在她的家鄉享年75歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sigrid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old Norse female personal name derived from sigr ‘victory’ + fríðr ‘fair, beautiful’. The name is now also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: The Russo-Swedish War
historicEvents.description: While in an alliance with Grand Prince Ivan III of Moscow, King Hans of Denmark and Norway invaded Sweden and was declared King of Sweden.

historicEvents.title: The Stockholm Bloodbath
historicEvents.description: A mass execution of Swedish nobles by Danish king Christian II is known as the Stockholm Bloodbath. Christian II invaded Sweden in 1519 and took hold of Stockholm in September 1520. Over 80 nobles were executed for heresy on November 8 and 9. The outrage from the executions led to the Swedish removal of support of the Kalmar Union.

historicEvents.title: Swedish War of Liberation
historicEvents.description: The Swedish War of Liberation was a civil war led by nobleman Gustav Vasa. As Christian II heard of the rebellion, he confronted Vasa's men, who won the battle at Brunbacks Ferry. Christian II was defeated by the Swedes in Stockholm and a truce was agreed upon. Vasa was given as a hostage as a show of good faith until the treaty was signed. The Danish King did not keep his word and Vasa was held as a prisoner for two years until his escape. A bounty was placed on Vasa's head. Vasa worked to inspire many to join his cause and lived under disguise until the Danes surrendered in 1525.

historicEvents.title: First Full Swedish Translation of the Bible
historicEvents.description: The first full Swedish translation of the Bible, known as the Gustav Bible, was completed by Olaus Petri and Laurentius Andreae and published in 1540.

historicEvents.title: Sweden Becomes Lutheran Nation
historicEvents.description: Sweden officially declared itself a Lutheran nation in 1544.

en.lifeSummary: When Sigrid Esbjörnsdotter was born in 1475, in Skalmsjö, Västernorrland, Sweden, her father, Esbjörn Öndesson, was 15 and her mother, Elna Elin Persdotter, was 13. She had at least 4 sons with Olof Eriksson. She died in 1550, in her hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sigrid Esbjörnsdotter est née en 1475, à Skalmsjö, Västernorrland, Suède, son père, Esbjörn Öndesson, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Elna Elin Persdotter, avait 13 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec Olof Eriksson. Elle est décédée en 1550, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sigrid Esbjörnsdotter 1475 in Skalmsjö, Västernorrland, Schweden geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Esbjörn Öndesson 15 und ihre Mutter Elna Elin Persdotter 13. Sie hatte mit Olof Eriksson mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1550 im Alter von 75 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sigrid Esbjörnsdotter è nata il nel 1475 nel Skalmsjö, Västernorrland, Svezia, sua padre, Esbjörn Öndesson, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Elna Elin Persdotter, aveva 13 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con Olof Eriksson. Morì nel 1550, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sigrid Esbjörnsdotterが1475年にスウェーデンvaステルノルランドスカルムスジoで生まれた時，父Esbjörn Öndessonは15歳，母Elna Elin Persdotterは13歳であった。彼女はOlof Erikssonとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1550年に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sigrid Esbjörnsdotter(이)가 1475년 스웨덴 브a스터노를랜드 스캘스jo에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Esbjörn Öndesson(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elna Elin Persdotter(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 Olof Eriksson(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1550년 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sigrid Esbjörnsdotter nasceu em 1475, em Skalmsjö, Västernorrland, Suécia, seu pai, Esbjörn Öndesson, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Elna Elin Persdotter, tinha 13 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Olof Eriksson. Ela faleceu em 1550, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sigrid Esbjörnsdotter родилась в 1475 г. в местности скалмсджo, вaстирноррланд, Швеция, её отцу по имени Esbjörn Öndesson было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Elna Elin Persdotter, 13. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от Olof Eriksson. Она умерла в 1550 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sigrid Esbjörnsdotter nació en 1475, en Skalmsjö, Västernorrland, Suecia, su papá, Esbjörn Öndesson, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Elna Elin Persdotter, tenía 13 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Olof Eriksson. Murió en 1550, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
